message:
test(web): add integration tests for error monitoring hooks

Implements integration tests for Sentry configuration (jeffreysprompts.com-7m9s):
- sentry-server.test.ts: 12 tests for server-side Sentry config
- sentry-client.test.tsx: 20 tests for client-side + error boundary

Tests verify:
- Configuration file structure and required options
- Error capture with requestId correlation
- PII protection (no sensitive data in context)
- Error boundary integration with Sentry
- Instrumentation hooks for Node.js and Edge runtimes

All 32 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
